mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.nickname as uploader_nickname FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.uploader_id = u.id ORDER BY r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, u.nickname as uploader_nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resource WHERE uploader_id = r.uploader_id) as user_upload_count FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.uploader_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT r.*, u.nickname as uploader_nickname FROM resource r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.uploader_id = u.id WHERE r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource(title, file_path, file_size, points, uploader_id, description, create_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{points}, #{uploaderId}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE resource SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resource SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
